name: Public Joint Stock Company Krasnoyarskenergosbyt
summary: Public Joint Stock Company Krasnoyarskenergosbyt sells electricity in Russia. The company also engages in the sale and maintenance of electricity meters; testing and measuring parameters of electrical equipment; conducting thermal imaging surveys; and preparing documentation for concluding an energy supply contract. In addition, it provides services in the fields of housing and communal services, such as plumbing, electrical, and general construction. Public Joint Stock Company Krasnoyarskenergosbyt is based in Krasnoyarsk, Russia.
